prompt: Edit image 1, the illustrated world map, by adding new whimsical animal icons inspired by the reference images. Introduce an anime-style cat icon with a crescent moon motif similar to image 2 near Europe. Place a stylized dog icon featuring the distinct expression and lines from image 3 in North America. Add a cute, heart-themed cartoon fox icon in the style and colors of image 4 to Asia.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1, the illustrated world map, by adding three new whimsical animal icons inspired by the provided reference images.

1.  Integrate an anime-style black cat icon with a prominent crescent moon motif on its forehead, directly inspired by the appearance and details of reference image 2. Position this cat icon near the continent of Europe.
2.  Introduce a stylized white dog icon, meticulously replicating the distinct closed-eye expression and characteristic line work visible in reference image 3. Place this dog icon within the landmass of North America.
3.  Add a cute, heart-themed cartoon fox icon, adopting the specific style, color palette (red/cream/pink), and overall charming aesthetic of reference image 4. Position this fox icon on the continent of Asia.
objects: Anime-style black cat icon with crescent moon, positioned near Europe
Stylized white dog icon with closed-eye expression, positioned within North America
Cute, heart-themed cartoon fox icon with red/cream/pink colors, positioned on Asia
Various existing whimsical animal illustrations (from original map)
